CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On May 1, 2003
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: F. Dias/Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff: Honda Building Maintenance company present by counsel, Christopher Jagard.
Plaintiff witness, David Chong was sworn and examined,
The Court hears evidence and grants default judgment as follows: In favor of plaintiff and against defendant.
Damages in the amount of $31,649.00
Costs in the amount of $329.50
Attorney's fees in the amount of $4,600.00
Interest $4,126.90
Total $40,705.40
Counsel to prepare judgment.
